sas_inputs.description: This SAS code creates a sample dataset, calculates a running total of order totals using the RETAIN statement, and also uses the LAG function to get the previous order total.
Demonstrate a MERGE BY with one-to-many relationships and update logic using MERGE_SEMANTICS.

This SAS code creates two sample datasets (employees and sales), then uses PROC SQL to join and analyze the data. The query selects employee information and total sales by department, grouping records by department and only including departments with total sales exceeding 30000.
Example code demonstrating date arithmetic using SAS functions such as MDY, TODAY, INTNX, INTCK, and DATEPART
This SAS code defines and calls a macro to calculate summary statistics for a given variable in a dataset.
This code calculates the mean age of patients by their gender using PROC_MEANS and prints the results.
